<div>Truly enjoyed our conversation today. Your story from the bike parts distributor to the $55M exit really resonated with me. I see why youŐve been successful: you bet on people.<br></div>

<div>On Tue, Jan 27, 2026 at 11:24?AM Leon Basin &lt<u>lbasin23@gmail.com</u>&gt wrote:</div>
<div>Hi Jassi,<br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>I am looking forward to catching up tomorrow.<br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Ahead of our meeting, I did a quick architectural scan of the CoachRobo/TalSmart funnel and noticed a high-value signal leak that fits exactly into the &quotRevenue Architecture&quot work IŐve been doing.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div><b>The Diagnosis: The &quotAssessment Void.&quot</b> Right now, if a &quotWhale&quot (e.g., an Oracle VP of Sales) takes your IT Sales IQ Assessment, they receive a score but the system likely treats them the same as a junior SDR. If they do not purchase immediately, that signal decays by 90% within 48 hours.</div>
<div><b>The Fix: The &quotBasin::Nexus&quot Architecture</b> I have drafted a 1-page &quotGap Analysis&quot <b>(attached)</b> showing how to automate the following:</div>
<ul>
<li><b>Ingest:</b> Catch the score instantly.</li>
<li><b>Enrich:</b> Identify if they are a &quotDecision Maker&quot (VP) vs. an &quotEnd User&quot (SDR).</li>
<li><b>Route:</b> Auto-send &quotCareer Intelligence&quot Reports to SDRs, while simultaneously alerting you for VPs.</li>
</ul>
<div>This process converts curiosity into revenue with zero human latency.</div>
<div>We can walk through the logic on Wednesday, but I wanted to send this blueprint ahead of time so we can get straight to the building process.<br></div>
<div>See you then,</div>
<div>Leon<br></div>
